name: Grayscale BNB ETF
business: Grayscale BNB ETF is a passive investment vehicle that holds BNB digital assets. Its investment objective is for the value of the Shares to reflect the value of BNB held by the Trust, less expenses and liabilities. The Trust does not seek to generate returns beyond tracking the price of BNB and any BNB earned as Staking Consideration.

exposures.sentence: The Trust’s purpose is to hold “BNB”, which are digital assets that are created and transmitted through the operations of the peer-to-peer BNB Smart Chain, a decentralized network of computers that operates on cryptographic protocols.

As a passive investment vehicle, the Trust’s investment objective is for the value of the Shares (based on BNB per Share) to reflect the value of BNB held by the Trust, including BNB earned as Staking Consideration (to the extent that the Staking Condition is satisfied and Staking is implemented), determined by reference to the Index Price, less the Trust’s expenses and other liabilities.

tamClaims.claim: As of March 31, 2026, the aggregate market value of BNB was $84.1 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: As of March 31, 2026, the aggregate market value of BNB was $84.1 billion.

tamClaims.claim: As of March 31, 2026, BNB was the fourth largest digital asset by market capitalization, as tracked by CoinMarketCap.com.
tamClaims.sentence: As of March 31, 2026, BNB was the fourth largest digital asset by market capitalization, as tracked by CoinMarketCap.com.

tamClaims.claim: As of March 31, 2026, the 24-hour trading volume of BNB was approximately $285.5 million.
tamClaims.sentence: As of March 31, 2026, the 24-hour trading volume of BNB was approximately $285.5 million.
